articles.title: NFL combine 2026 live updates, results tracker: DL, EDGE, LB workouts take center stage - CBS Sports
articles.description: Stay up to date with everything that happens during on-field workouts in Indianapolis
articles.content: Defensive linemen, edge rushers and linebackers were the first to arrive this week in Indianapolis. After being poked and prodded through medical evaluations and standing trial against a horde of ass… [+1192 chars]
